.gitlab-ci.yml.general_idea: Replace the included external CI configuration with a local definition using a Java 21 base image.

.vscode/launch.json.general_idea: Update the main class package path to reflect the new project structure.
Remove unused configuration fields from the launch configuration.
Add an empty args field to the launch configuration.
Add version field to the launch configuration.
Fix spacing in the launch configuration name for consistency.

dev-env/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Configure Keycloak to automatically import the realm configuration on startup.
Switch Keycloak database to in-memory mode for development convenience.
Remove explicit default network attachment from the Keycloak service.
Remove the external default network definition from the docker-compose file.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 specifications, failing the migration goal to Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target properties set to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the Maven compiler plugin uses Java 21 language features and bytecode compatibility, overriding any defaults.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the Spring Boot parent POM and manage dependencies manually.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project structure changes from inheriting Spring Boot's dependency management to explicit version control, likely to decouple from parent lifecycle or resolve conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a dependencyManagement section to explicitly define versions for core libraries.
pom.xml.why_exists: Replaces the implicit version management previously provided by the Spring Boot parent POM.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit version tags to Spring Boot starter dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required because the Spring Boot parent POM (which previously managed these versions) has been removed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit version tags to non-Spring Boot dependencies (Lombok, Liquibase, PostgreSQL, H2, Security).
pom.xml.why_exists: Required because the Spring Boot parent POM (which previously managed these versions) has been removed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin configuration to use properties for source and target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Aligns the compiler plugin configuration with the new explicit java.version property.
Ensures test execution is compatible with the build environment and Java 21.
Enables building container images directly via Maven, a feature often used in modern Spring Boot 3.x/Java 21 setups.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update groupId, artifactId, name, and description to reflect the new project identity.
pom.xml.why_exists: Rebrands the project from a generic example to the specific 'Gestion des Ressources Pédagogiques' application.
pom.xml.after:
<groupId>fr.grptp</groupId>
<artifactId>grp-api</artifactId>
<name>Gestion des Ressources Pédagogiques API</name>
<description>API Spring Boot pour le projet GRP</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SonarQube properties for code quality analysis.
pom.xml.why_exists: Integrates the project with SonarQube for static code analysis in the CI pipeline.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Update Docker image reference to use CI registry variable instead of manual registry/group/artifact variables.

src/main/java/fr/backend/app/config/Swag.general_idea: Configure Spring Security to be stateless by disabling session creation, which is required for JWT-based authentication.
Simplify CSRF configuration by disabling it entirely instead of selectively ignoring specific Swagger endpoints.
src/main/java/fr/backend/app/config/Swag.before: .csrf(csrf -> csrf.ignoringRequestMatchers(request -> { String path = request.getRequestURI(); return path != null && (path.startsWith("/v3/api-docs") || path.startsWith("/swagger-ui")); }))

src/main/resources/application-dev.yml.general_idea: Update Keycloak issuer URI from a Docker service name to localhost for local development.
Configure Spring Security to extract authorities from Keycloak's realm_access.roles claim.

src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.general_idea: Activate the inclusion of the version 1.0.0 Liquibase changelog file.
src/main/resources/db/changelog/db.chang.before:
<!-- Add your changelog includes here -->
    <!-- Example: <include file="/db/changelog/1.0.0/changeLog.xml"/> -->
